{{Enemy Infobox|Phrog Parasite|2}}
'''Phrog Parasite''' is an {{2|Elites|Elite}} found in the {{2|Overgrowth}}.

== Pattern ==
{{Intents|Phrog Parasite|2}}
Phrog Parasite alternates between its two moves:
# {{Int|Phrog Parasite|Infect||2}}
# {{Int|Phrog Parasite|Lash||2}}
# Back to {{Int|Phrog Parasite|Infect||2}}, and so on.

When Phrog Parasite dies, {{BD|Infested||2}} triggers and 4 {{M|Wriggler||2}}s are summoned. They will be stunned and do nothing on their first turn. The fight continues until all Wrigglers are defeated.

== Notes ==

Whether the Wrigglers remain stunned on the player's next turn depends on whether the Phrog dies on the player's turn or its own turn.
* If the Phrog is killed normally with an attack card, the Wrigglers will '''not''' be stunned on the player's next turn.
* If the Phrog is killed by damage from an Orb, then the Wrigglers will '''not''' be stunned on the player's next turn.
* If the Phrog dies to either {{KW|Poison||2}} or {{KW|Doom||2}}, then this counts as dying on its own turn, and so the Wrigglers '''will''' be stunned on the player's next turn.
<!--
Confirm this is all correct, I've tested but may have missed something or made a mistake
-->
== Useful Cards ==

* Frontloaded damage cards like {{C|Perfected Strike||2}}, {{C|Backstab||2}}, and {{C|Defile||2}} can be useful for taking down the Phrog Parasite before it can add too many copies of Infection to your deck, as well as for finishing off individual Wrigglers quickly.
* {{C|Deathbringer||2}}, {{C|Deadly Poison||2}} and other cards which apply {{KW|Poison||2}} or {{KW|Doom||2}} can give you an extra turn before the Wrigglers attack if the Phrog dies to their damage.
* Attacks which target all enemies like {{C|Dagger Spray||2}}, {{C|Bone Shards||2}} or {{C|Whirlwind||2}} can damage all of the Wrigglers at once.
* Cards which can exhaust or discard the Infections, such as {{C|Burning Pact||2}} or {{C|Hidden Daggers||2}}, can prevent them from damaging you.

== Trivia ==

* The {{R|Paper Phrog||2}} resembles the Phrog Parasite.
